narrative:
Westerville 4-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 944 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
